Please claim one lane before editing; avoid BMA path, use Form-native primitives/carriers/receipts."

failure_reason: Grouped the fourth-kernel walls into parallel work families, delegated the available lanes through coord, and closed the active Form-native primitive control/backtracking group. The new form-control-backtracking-ml band returns 65535 four-way and the fourth-arm gate returns PASS-4WAY. Remaining source-level break/continue/try/throw/while/for/switch lowering is documented as the next BML compiler wall rather than claimed as floor.
